iran.name: Natanz FEP
iran.detail: B-2 GBU-57 MOP strikes. Est. 60-70% surface facilities destroyed. Underground centrifuge halls status TBD.

iran.name: Fordow FFEP
iran.detail: Hardened underground facility. B-2 strikes with MOP bunker busters. Damage assessment in progress. Partial functionality possible.

iran.name: Isfahan UCF
iran.detail: Uranium conversion facility targeted by IDF F-35I strikes. Conversion capacity disrupted.

iran.name: Bushehr NPP
iran.detail: INTENTIONALLY NOT TARGETED per US/IDF policy. Risk of radiological incident. IAEA monitoring requested.

iran.name: Arak IR-40 Reactor
iran.detail: Heavy water reactor targeted. Plutonium production pathway disrupted.

iran.name: Parchin Military Complex
iran.detail: IRGC weapons research site. IDF F-35I precision strikes on specific buildings assessed to be weapons-relevant.

israel.name: Negev Nuclear Research Center (Dimona)
israel.detail: Israel maintains policy of nuclear ambiguity. Est. 80-90 warheads (FAS/SIPRI). Jericho III ICBM capability. Submarine-based 2nd strike (Dolphin-class, Popeye Turbo ALCM).
